MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on January 26, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the inventory and appraisal, and the petition for final distribution have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
